content.speakerText: How’s the budget holding up? Did you go over on marketing?
content.speakerTextCn: 预算情况如何？市场支出超支了吗？

options.text: We’re at 95% of the budget, and we’ve seen a 20% increase in sales.
I don’t know—I’m not in charge of the budget.
We spent way too much—no return at all.
The budget is fine, but we didn’t do any marketing.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了预算使用比例并强调了积极收益，符合场景中‘超支时需说明收益’的要求。选项2回避问题，选项3负面描述无收益，选项4与问题矛盾（已做市场支出），均不符合专业沟通规范。

content.speakerText: I noticed the travel expenses are higher than planned. Can you explain?
content.speakerTextCn: 我注意到差旅费用比计划高，能解释一下吗？

options.text: Yes, we had to fly three team members to meet a key client—it led to a signed contract.
I forgot to submit the receipts.
The budget was too low, so we had no choice.
I’m not sure—I didn’t book the flights.

content.explanation: 正确答案既承认超支，又说明了商业收益，符合预算讨论中的关键沟通策略。选项2和4推卸责任，选项3仅抱怨预算不足，未提供价值论证，均缺乏专业性。

content.speakerText: Are we on track with the Q3 budget overall?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们整体Q3预算进展如何？

options.text: We’re at 72% spent, and all key projects are on schedule.
I think we’re doing okay, but I didn’t check the numbers.
We’re way over, but I’m sure it’ll balance out next quarter.
Budget? I only care about getting the work done.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了具体使用比例和项目进度，体现专业和负责任的态度。选项2缺乏数据支持，选项3预测未来平衡但无依据，选项4态度消极，均不符合职场预算沟通标准。

content.template: We’re at ___% of the budget—within limits, and the ROI’s been great.
content.hint: 表示预算使用比例的常见数字，强调未超支
content.knowledgePoint: 预算使用比例表达（百分比+状态说明）

content.template: We overshot by ___%, but it brought in 3 new clients.
content.hint: 轻微超支的合理百分比，常用于说明投资回报
content.knowledgePoint: 超支幅度的合理表达（10%-15%为常见范围）

content.template: The spending is slightly over, but we’ve seen a strong ___ in customer acquisition.
content.hint: 描述支出带来积极效果的动词，常与客户增长搭配

content.speakerText: How’s the budget holding up? Did you go over on marketing?
content.speakerTextCn: 预算情况如何？市场支出超支了吗？
expectedAnswers: We’re at 85% of the budget, and we’ve generated 5 new leads—ROI is excellent.
Slightly over budget—by about 8%—but we got two major clients signed.
We stayed under budget, but we’re planning to ramp up next month to capture seasonal demand.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应预算状态（是否超支/未超支）
语言准确性：语法正确，使用恰当的预算词汇（budget, ROI, overshot, within limits）
表达自然度：语调自然，符合职场口语习惯，避免机械背诵
关键词覆盖：至少包含一个预算状态词和一个收益说明词

content.speakerText: The IT budget seems to have gone over. Can you give me a quick update?
content.speakerTextCn: IT预算似乎超支了，能给我一个简要更新吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, we went 12% over due to unexpected cloud storage needs, but it improved system uptime by 40%.
We’re at 92% spent—slightly over, but the new software is already saving 10 hours per week per team.
We’re on track overall, and the minor overage was offset by savings in other departments.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰说明超支/未超支状态及原因
语言准确性：使用正确动词（went over, spent, offset）和专业术语（uptime, software, departments）
表达自然度：语句连贯，有逻辑衔接，非碎片化回答
关键词覆盖：包含预算状态词、原因词、收益词（至少两项）

content.speakerText: Are we still within budget for the annual conference?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们今年的年会预算还在控制范围内吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, we’re at 78% with three vendors confirmed—plenty of room left, and we’ve already secured a keynote speaker.
We’re slightly over—about 7%—but we upgraded the venue to improve attendee satisfaction, which boosted post-event feedback.
We’re under budget, and we’ve redirected the surplus to the digital marketing campaign for better reach.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应预算状态并说明后续影响
语言准确性：使用正确表达（within budget, over, redirected, secured）
表达自然度：语句流畅，有逻辑性，避免重复或空洞回答
关键词覆盖：包含预算状态、支出原因、积极影响或调整策略
